index.heroTitle:
Reliable cleaning service
in the Kuopio area
index.heroSubtitle:
Clean spaces – A smoother everyday life and a better mood!
Pohjoisen Helmi services for businesses and construction professionals in Kuopio.
index.servicesSubtitle: Pohjoisen Helmi provides reliable and professional construction cleaning services in the Kuopio area. We specialize in construction and final cleaning, maintenance cleaning, and move-out cleaning.
index.card1Text: We use professional-grade cleaning products, proper methods, and the right tools.
index.card2Text: We always stick to agreed schedules and deliver service as promised.
index.card3Text: We are honest, keep our word, and leave every job spotless.
index.protectionText: Our services go beyond basic cleaning and give you thorough cleanliness that brings new energy to everyday life.
index.check1: Construction and final cleaning on sites and project spaces
index.check2: Site office and workspace cleaning during construction
index.check3: Move-out cleaning and final handover preparation
index.check5: Professional service for business and construction clients
index.measuresSubtitle: We handle site cleaning and final preparation with careful standards.
index.measure1Text: We clean the construction site step by step so the final result is safe and usable.
index.measure2Text: We keep construction dust under control and maintain clean conditions throughout the process.
index.measure3Text: Final cleaning and handover preparation is done thoroughly before the project is delivered.
index.measure4Text: We ensure surfaces are ready and clean for furniture and fixtures.
index.measure5Text: We work on schedule so cleaning does not delay the project.
index.measure6Text: Our experienced team delivers precise and responsible service.
index.offersSubtitle: Our services for businesses and private clients:
index.offer1Text: We keep construction sites and site offices clean through every stage of the build. We remove fine dust and dirt efficiently so the property is ready for handover.
index.offer2Text: Leave cleaning to professionals so you can focus on work. Clean offices boost productivity and appearance.
index.offer3Text: Ease moving stress with thorough cleaning for your old or new home.
index.contactSubtitle: Tell us about your space and schedule. We respond quickly and propose a suitable cleaning solution.

about.goalTitle:
Our goal is to ensure
your space is clean.
about.goalDesc: Pohjoisen Helmi provides reliable and professional cleaning services in the Kuopio area. We specialize in construction and final cleaning, maintenance cleaning, and move-out cleaning. We make sure your site is ready for handover after construction or renovation.
about.processSubtitle:
We offer a simple and efficient process so you get
a clean, healthy space without hassle.
about.step1Text: Book your service easily online in just a few minutes.
about.step2Text: Our professional cleaning service delivers the best results while respecting your privacy.
about.step3Text: We ensure premises and construction sites are ready for use and tidy on the agreed schedule.

contactPage.sectionSubtitle:
Reach us in the way that suits you best. We answer all inquiries
within 24 hours.

tools.introSubtitle:
We invest in industry-leading cleaning equipment to deliver excellent results.
Many of our professional machines are also available for rent — do the job right.
tools.catalogSubtitle: Browse our full range — from heavy industrial machines to precision hand tools.
tools.tool1Text: Heavy 3600W wet-and-dry vacuum with HEPA filtration, perfect for removing construction dust and debris from large job sites.
tools.tool2Text: Walk-behind automatic floor scrubber with adjustable scrub pressure and drying system, ideal for large tile or polished concrete surfaces.
tools.tool3Text: High-pressure steam cleaning removes dirt and residues without chemicals. Great for site kitchens, bathrooms, and sensitive environments.
tools.tool4Text: 3000 PSI electric pressure washer for outdoor surfaces, driveways, building facades, and outdoor furniture. Removes dirt quickly and efficiently.
tools.tool5Text: Complete water-fed pole system for high-reach cleaning up to 12 m. Includes squeegees, microfiber cloths, and a pure water filtration unit.
tools.tool6Text: Professional hot water extraction machine for deep cleaning surfaces and materials. Effectively removes stains and embedded dirt.
tools.whySubtitle: Every machine is maintained, certified, and ready for professional use.
tools.why1Text: All equipment meets industry safety standards. Every tool is tested before rental to ensure reliable and safe operation.
tools.why2Text: Book online or call us and pick up your rental the same day. Flexible daily, weekly, and weekend packages available.
tools.why3Text: Not sure which tool to choose? Our team provides practical guidance and instructions with every rental.
tools.rentalFormSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we will confirm availability and pricing within 2 hours.
